entity.summary: Dubai-licensed centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated through Trek Labs Ltd FZE, officially launched on November 9, 2023 after receiving a VARA licence for Exchange Services.
entity.notes: This record is limited to Backpack Exchange. Backpack Wallet, Mad Lads, Backpack EU, securities products, and other ecosystem products remain separate identities or product boundaries unless explicitly linked. The prior 2024 year marker is replaced by the official November 2023 exchange launch date.

expected.summary: Crypto exchange candidate from the CCXT-supported exchange list and official Backpack Exchange domain. HEI records it as an active centralized exchange seed because it has an official trading-domain identity beyond a single database row.

changes.summary: Dubai-licensed centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated through Trek Labs Ltd FZE, officially launched on November 9, 2023 after receiving a VARA licence for Exchange Services.
changes.notes: This record is limited to Backpack Exchange. Backpack Wallet, Mad Lads, Backpack EU, securities products, and other ecosystem products remain separate identities or product boundaries unless explicitly linked. The prior 2024 year marker is replaced by the official November 2023 exchange launch date.

events.title: Backpack operator received Dubai VARA licence
events.description: Dubai's VARA public register records Trek Labs Ltd FZE, operating Backpack, as licensed for Exchange Services on October 30, 2023.
events.notes: Regulatory milestone immediately preceding public exchange launch.

events.title: Backpack Exchange officially launched
events.description: Backpack announced the official launch of its cryptocurrency exchange after receiving the Dubai VARA licence.
events.notes: The official launch post provides the exact public launch date.

evidence.title: Trek Labs Ltd FZE (Backpack)
evidence.notes: Public register entry for active Exchange Services licence VL/23/07/001.

evidence.title: Backpack Goes Global: Launches Exchange with Dubai License
evidence.notes: Official announcement of exchange launch following VARA licensing.

evidence.title: About Backpack
evidence.notes: Official company timeline and current description confirming the November 2023 beta launch and active regulated exchange platform.
